tasks.description: Scan the /knowledge directory and synchronize the ChromaDB index with any new files found.
tasks.expected: A summary report of the total files indexed and a confirmation that the RAG database is up to date.

tasks.description: Research best practices for implementing a secure SQLite database connection in Python using 2024 standards.
tasks.expected: A technical report detailing the required libraries, connection string patterns, and common pitfalls.

tasks.description: Based on the research, design a modular file structure and a class-based schema for the database handler.
tasks.expected: A structural plan showing the file names, class definitions, and how components interact.

tasks.description: Review the proposed architecture for SQL injection risks and ensure the plan follows 'Zero Trust' principles.
tasks.expected: A security clearance report or a list of mandatory hardening changes the coder must follow.

tasks.description: Implement the database handler in 'db_manager.py' based on the architect's design and auditor's security rules.
tasks.expected: A success message confirming 'db_manager.py' has been written to the /app/output directory.

tasks.description: 1. Write pytest unit tests for the generated code. 2. Execute the tests using the safe_terminal_exec tool. 3. Report if the tests passed or failed.
tasks.expected: A test results report including the stdout from the pytest run.

tasks.description: Update the project's README.md to include documentation for the new database module and instructions on running the tests.
tasks.expected: A Markdown formatted documentation block saved as 'README_UPDATE.md'.
